requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety (Blue Light Hazard) — ES adopting IEC 62471 vs CN GB/T 20145
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全（蓝光危害）——ES 采纳 IEC 62471 vs 中国 GB/T 20145
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全（藍光危害）——ES 採納 IEC 62471 vs 中國 GB/T 20145

summary.en: LED lamps and luminaires placed on the Egyptian market are expected to address photobiological safety — in particular blue light hazard and retinal/skin/cornea exposure — through the relevant EOS ES standard, which adopts IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems). IEC 62471 assigns a Risk Group (RG0 Exempt, RG1 Low, RG2 Moderate, RG3 High) based on the measured radiance and irradiance of the light source. The risk-group classification supports the product safety assessment and may need to be declared on packaging or in the technical documentation depending on the risk group and product type. Confirm the current ES standard number adopting IEC 62471 and any Egyptian labelling expectation for higher risk groups.
summary.zh: 投放埃及市场的 LED 灯及灯具应通过相关 EOS ES 标准处理光生物安全——尤其是蓝光危害及视网膜/皮肤/角膜暴露——该标准采纳 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）。IEC 62471 依据测得的光源辐亮度和辐照度划分风险组别（RG0 豁免、RG1 低、RG2 中、RG3 高）。风险组别分类支持产品安全评估，并可能须根据风险组别和产品类型在包装或技术文件中声明。请确认现行采纳 IEC 62471 的 ES 标准编号及埃及对较高风险组别的任何标签要求。
summary.zht: 投放埃及市場的 LED 燈及燈具應通過相關 EOS ES 標準處理光生物安全——尤其是藍光危害及視網膜/皮膚/角膜暴露——該標準採納 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）。IEC 62471 依據測得的光源輻亮度和輻照度劃分風險組別（RG0 豁免、RG1 低、RG2 中、RG3 高）。風險組別分類支持產品安全評估，並可能須根據風險組別和產品類型在包裝或技術文件中聲明。請確認現行採納 IEC 62471 的 ES 標準編號及埃及對較高風險組別的任何標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: EOS ES standard adopting IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (verify current ES number/edition)
IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification RG0–RG3)

summary.en: China addresses photobiological safety through GB/T 20145 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems — the IEC 62471 equivalent), which uses the same RG0–RG3 risk group framework. For LED products, blue light hazard assessment is further reflected in product standards such as GB 7000.1 (general luminaire safety, which references photobiological safety) and supporting GB/T standards. The risk-group classification methodology is technically aligned with the international IEC 62471 base.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 20145（灯和灯系统的光生物安全——IEC 62471 对应标准）处理光生物安全，采用相同的 RG0–RG3 风险组别框架。对于 LED 产品，蓝光危害评估还反映在 GB 7000.1（一般灯具安全，引用光生物安全）等产品标准及相关 GB/T 标准中。风险组别分类方法在技术上与国际 IEC 62471 基础对齐。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 20145（燈和燈系統的光生物安全——IEC 62471 對應標準）處理光生物安全，採用相同的 RG0–RG3 風險組別框架。對於 LED 產品，藍光危害評估還反映在 GB 7000.1（一般燈具安全，引用光生物安全）等產品標準及相關 GB/T 標準中。風險組別分類方法在技術上與國際 IEC 62471 基礎對齊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (China, IEC 62471-aligned)
GB 7000.1 — Luminaires general requirements and tests (China, references photobiological safety)

gap.en: Because China's GB/T 20145 and Egypt's ES standard both derive from IEC 62471 using the same RG0–RG3 framework, the underlying photobiological assessment is technically aligned and a CN-tested risk-group classification will generally transfer in substance. The gap is administrative and documentary: the report must reference the IEC 62471 / ES standard editions accepted by EOS rather than the GB/T number, and the importer should confirm whether Egypt expects a risk-group declaration on packaging for products above RG1. Re-issue or re-reference the photobiological safety test report to the IEC 62471 edition adopted by the current Egyptian ES standard, and confirm the accepting laboratory requirement with the importer.
gap.zh: 由于中国 GB/T 20145 与埃及 ES 标准均源自 IEC 62471 并采用相同的 RG0–RG3 框架，底层光生物评估在技术上对齐，中国测得的风险组别分类在实质上一般可转移。差距是行政性和文件性的：报告须引用 EOS 接受的 IEC 62471/ES 标准版本而非 GB/T 编号，进口商应确认埃及是否要求 RG1 以上产品在包装上声明风险组别。请将光生物安全检测报告重新出具或重新引用至现行埃及 ES 标准所采纳的 IEC 62471 版本，并与进口商确认受理实验室的要求。
gap.zht: 由於中國 GB/T 20145 與埃及 ES 標準均源自 IEC 62471 並採用相同的 RG0–RG3 框架，底層光生物評估在技術上對齊，中國測得的風險組別分類在實質上一般可轉移。差距是行政性和文件性的：報告須引用 EOS 接受的 IEC 62471/ES 標準版本而非 GB/T 編號，進口商應確認埃及是否要求 RG1 以上產品在包裝上聲明風險組別。請將光生物安全檢測報告重新出具或重新引用至現行埃及 ES 標準所採納的 IEC 62471 版本，並與進口商確認受理實驗室的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (where in scope) — photobiological safety per ES standard adopting IEC 62471 expected; risk-group declaration may be required for higher risk groups (verify)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (where in scope) — GB/T 20145 photobiological safety assessment; referenced in GB 7000.1 luminaire safety

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt addresses photobiological (blue light) safety via an ES standard adopting IEC 62471, the same RG0–RG3 base as China's GB/T 20145, so the risk-group classification is technically aligned. The gap is documentary: reference the IEC 62471 / ES edition accepted by EOS rather than the GB/T number, and confirm with the importer whether a risk-group declaration on packaging is expected for products above RG1.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及通过采纳 IEC 62471 的 ES 标准处理光生物（蓝光）安全，与中国 GB/T 20145 同为 RG0–RG3 基础，因此风险组别分类在技术上对齐。差距是文件性的：引用 EOS 接受的 IEC 62471/ES 版本而非 GB/T 编号，并与进口商确认 RG1 以上产品是否须在包装上声明风险组别。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及通過採納 IEC 62471 的 ES 標準處理光生物（藍光）安全，與中國 GB/T 20145 同為 RG0–RG3 基礎，因此風險組別分類在技術上對齊。差距是文件性的：引用 EOS 接受的 IEC 62471/ES 版本而非 GB/T 編號，並與進口商確認 RG1 以上產品是否須在包裝上聲明風險組別。

requirement_topic.en: Flicker, Glare, and Performance Marking Claims vs CN GB/T Performance Standards
requirement_topic.zh: 频闪、眩光及性能标注声明 vs 中国 GB/T 性能标准
requirement_topic.zht: 頻閃、眩光及性能標註聲明 vs 中國 GB/T 性能標準

summary.en: Beyond the core blue-light-hazard classification, performance and quality-of-light parameters that affect user comfort and safety — temporal light modulation (flicker / stroboscopic effect), glare, colour rendering index (CRI/Ra), and correlated colour temperature (CCT) — are governed by the EOS ES performance standards adopting the relevant IEC/CIE methods. Marking and declared performance claims on the product or packaging (lumen output, CCT, CRI, rated life) must be substantiated and consistent with the test data the importer holds. Where the Egyptian energy-label scheme or product standard requires declared values, those values must be accurate and verifiable. Confirm the specific ES performance standard and the declared-parameter set required for the luminaire category.
summary.zh: 除核心蓝光危害分类外，影响使用者舒适与安全的性能及光品质参数——时间光调制（频闪/频闪效应）、眩光、显色指数（CRI/Ra）及相关色温（CCT）——由采纳相关 IEC/CIE 方法的 EOS ES 性能标准管理。产品或包装上的标注及声明的性能（光通量、CCT、CRI、额定寿命）须有实证支持并与进口商持有的检测数据一致。当埃及能效标签制度或产品标准要求声明数值时，这些数值须准确且可验证。请确认该灯具类别适用的具体 ES 性能标准及所需声明参数集。
summary.zht: 除核心藍光危害分類外，影響使用者舒適與安全的性能及光品質參數——時間光調制（頻閃/頻閃效應）、眩光、顯色指數（CRI/Ra）及相關色溫（CCT）——由採納相關 IEC/CIE 方法的 EOS ES 性能標準管理。產品或包裝上的標註及聲明的性能（光通量、CCT、CRI、額定壽命）須有實證支持並與進口商持有的檢測數據一致。當埃及能效標籤制度或產品標準要求聲明數值時，這些數值須準確且可驗證。請確認該燈具類別適用的具體 ES 性能標準及所需聲明參數集。

standards_or_laws: EOS ES performance standard for LED lamps/luminaires — adopting IEC/CIE methods for CRI, CCT, flicker, and rated life (verify current ES number)
IEC/CIE performance and measurement methods (luminous flux, CRI, CCT, temporal light modulation) as adopted by the relevant ES standard

summary.en: China governs LED performance and light-quality parameters through GB/T performance standards — e.g. GB/T 24823 (performance requirements of LED lamps for general lighting service) and related GB/T standards covering luminous flux, CRI, CCT, and rated life, with temporal light modulation (flicker) addressed by GB/T standards on stroboscopic effect. Declared marking values must be consistent with these test methods. These GB/T performance methods are broadly aligned with IEC/CIE international methods but are filed and referenced under the Chinese standard numbers.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 性能标准管理 LED 性能及光品质参数——如 GB/T 24823（普通照明用 LED 灯性能要求）及涵盖光通量、CRI、CCT、额定寿命的相关 GB/T 标准，时间光调制（频闪）由频闪效应相关 GB/T 标准处理。标注声明数值须与这些测试方法一致。这些 GB/T 性能方法与 IEC/CIE 国际方法大体对齐，但按中国标准编号备案和引用。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 性能標準管理 LED 性能及光品質參數——如 GB/T 24823（普通照明用 LED 燈性能要求）及涵蓋光通量、CRI、CCT、額定壽命的相關 GB/T 標準，時間光調制（頻閃）由頻閃效應相關 GB/T 標準處理。標註聲明數值須與這些測試方法一致。這些 GB/T 性能方法與 IEC/CIE 國際方法大體對齊，但按中國標準編號備案和引用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24823 — Performance requirements of LED lamps for general lighting service (China)
GB/T standards on temporal light modulation / stroboscopic effect and related GB/T photometric performance methods (China)

gap.en: The performance and light-quality concepts (CRI, CCT, flicker, rated life) are common to both regimes and broadly traceable to IEC/CIE methods, so a well-characterised CN product usually performs to the same substance. The gap is again documentary and in the declared-value framework: marking and declared claims must align with the EOS ES performance standard and the parameters Egypt requires for that luminaire category, and the supporting test reports should reference the IEC/CIE methods adopted by Egypt rather than the GB/T numbers. Ensure that any performance claims printed on packaging (lumens, CCT, CRI, life hours) are substantiated by reports acceptable to the Egyptian importer, since inaccurate or unsubstantiated marking can be challenged at GOEIC inspection or in-market.
gap.zh: 性能与光品质概念（CRI、CCT、频闪、额定寿命）为两个体制所共有，且大体可追溯至 IEC/CIE 方法，因此特性明确的中国产品在实质上通常表现一致。差距同样在文件层面及声明数值框架：标注及声明须与 EOS ES 性能标准及埃及对该灯具类别所要求的参数一致，支持性检测报告应引用埃及采纳的 IEC/CIE 方法而非 GB/T 编号。请确保包装上印制的任何性能声明（光通量、CCT、CRI、寿命小时数）有埃及进口商可接受的报告支持，因为不准确或无实证的标注可能在 GOEIC 检验或市场上受到质疑。
gap.zht: 性能與光品質概念（CRI、CCT、頻閃、額定壽命）為兩個體制所共有，且大體可追溯至 IEC/CIE 方法，因此特性明確的中國產品在實質上通常表現一致。差距同樣在文件層面及聲明數值框架：標註及聲明須與 EOS ES 性能標準及埃及對該燈具類別所要求的參數一致，支持性檢測報告應引用埃及採納的 IEC/CIE 方法而非 GB/T 編號。請確保包裝上印製的任何性能聲明（光通量、CCT、CRI、壽命小時數）有埃及進口商可接受的報告支持，因為不準確或無實證的標註可能在 GOEIC 檢驗或市場上受到質疑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (where in scope) — declared performance/marking claims must conform to the relevant EOS ES performance standard and be substantiated by acceptable test reports
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (where in scope) — GB/T 24823 and related GB/T performance standards govern declared LED marking values in China

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt governs LED light-quality and performance (CRI, CCT, flicker, rated life) through EOS ES performance standards adopting IEC/CIE methods — conceptually aligned with China's GB/T 24823 and related GB/T standards. The gap is documentary and in the declared-value set: marking claims must conform to the Egyptian standard and be substantiated by acceptable reports referencing IEC/CIE methods. Verify the required declared parameters for the luminaire category before printing packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及通过采纳 IEC/CIE 方法的 EOS ES 性能标准管理 LED 光品质与性能（CRI、CCT、频闪、额定寿命）——在概念上与中国 GB/T 24823 及相关 GB/T 标准对齐。差距在文件层面及声明数值集：标注声明须符合埃及标准并有引用 IEC/CIE 方法的可接受报告支持。请在印制包装前核实该灯具类别所需的声明参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及通過採納 IEC/CIE 方法的 EOS ES 性能標準管理 LED 光品質與性能（CRI、CCT、頻閃、額定壽命）——在概念上與中國 GB/T 24823 及相關 GB/T 標準對齊。差距在文件層面及聲明數值集：標註聲明須符合埃及標準並有引用 IEC/CIE 方法的可接受報告支持。請在印製包裝前核實該燈具類別所需的聲明參數。
